falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $1.2k (key resistance level) on 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms bullish breakout invalidating consolidation pattern and HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Exceeds threshold for blowoff event, contradicting current HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Price fails to reach $38,000 (historical bottom level from 2022 pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Pattern failure invalidates similarity to bottom_2022_may_luna and current verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
